name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Direct income support of ₹6,000 per year to all farmer families with cultivable land, paid in 3 installments of ₹2,000 every 4 months.
eligibility_text: All small and marginal farmer families with cultivable land in their name.
exclusions: Institutional land holders, farmer families with any member serving/having served in constitutional posts, professionals (doctors, engineers, lawyers, CAs), pensioners with ₹10,000+ pension.
how_to_apply:
1. Visit pmkisan.gov.in → 'New Farmer Registration'
2. Or visit nearest CSC (Common Service Centre)
3. Or contact local Patwari/Lekhpal

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Crop insurance at subsidized premium. Farmer pays only 1.5-5% of sum insured. Covers yield loss due to natural calamities, pests, diseases.
benefit_amount: Sum insured varies by crop and area (typically ₹20,000-₹50,000/ha)
eligibility_text: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas. Both loanee and non-loanee farmers.
how_to_apply: Loanee farmers: automatic through bank. Non-loanee: apply at CSC, insurance company, or pmfby.gov.in

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Low-interest credit facility for farming needs. Interest subvention of 2%. Effective rate: 4% per annum for timely repayment.
benefit_amount: Credit limit based on land holding (₹50,000 to ₹3 lakh+)
eligibility_text: All farmers — individual, joint borrowers, tenant farmers, sharecroppers, oral lessees, SHGs of farmers.
how_to_apply: Apply at any nationalized bank, cooperative bank, or RRB. Bring land records and Aadhaar.

name: Ayushman Bharat — PM-JAY
description: Free health insurance up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. Covers 1,900+ procedures at empanelled hospitals.
eligibility_text: Families identified from SECC 2011 data. No cap on family size or age. Check at mera.pmjay.gov.in or call 14555.
documents_needed: Ayushman Card (can be made at CSC or hospital)
how_to_apply:
1. Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in
2. If eligible, get Ayushman Card at CSC or empanelled hospital
3. Show card + Aadhaar at hospital for free treatment

name: Jan Aushadhi (PMBJP)
description: Quality generic medicines at 50-90% lower cost than branded equivalents. Available at 10,000+ Jan Aushadhi Kendras across India.
how_to_apply: Find nearest store at janaushadhi.gov.in or call 1800-180-6060. Show prescription, get medicines.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
description: Financial assistance to build pucca house. Urban: interest subsidy up to ₹2.67 lakh on home loan. Rural: ₹1.30 lakh (₹1.20 lakh for hilly/difficult areas).
eligibility_text: EWS/LIG families without pucca house. Annual income up to ₹6 lakh for urban (EWS) and ₹3 lakh for rural.
how_to_apply: Urban: pmaymis.gov.in. Rural: Visit block office or apply online at pmayg.nic.in

name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
description: Guaranteed 100 days of wage employment per year to every rural household. Minimum wage as per state rate.
benefit_amount: 100 days guaranteed work at ₹250-350/day (varies by state)
eligibility_text: Any adult member of a rural household willing to do unskilled manual work. Must have job card.
how_to_apply: Visit your Gram Panchayat. Apply for job card. Demand work — must be provided within 15 days or get unemployment allowance.

name: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Free skill training and certification. Training in 200+ job roles. ₹8,000 stipend for training period. Placement assistance.
eligibility_text: Indian nationals, 15-45 years, school/college dropouts or unemployed.
how_to_apply: Visit pmkvyofficial.org or nearest training centre. Choose course, enroll, get trained and certified.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana
description: Free LPG connection for women from BPL/EWS families. Includes first refill and stove free of cost.
benefit_amount: Free LPG connection (~₹3,200 value) + first refill + stove
eligibility_text: Women from BPL households. Must be 18+ years. No existing LPG connection in household.
documents_needed: BPL Ration Card or eligible category certificate
how_to_apply: Visit nearest LPG distributor or apply online at pmujjwalayojana.com

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Savings scheme for girl child. Open account with ₹250, max ₹1.5 lakh/year. 8.2% interest (tax-free). Maturity at 21 years.
benefit_amount: 8.2% interest (tax-free). ~₹64 lakh on ₹1.5L/year deposit for 15 years.
eligibility_text: Girl child below 10 years. Max 2 accounts per family (3 for twins in second birth).
how_to_apply: Open account at post office or authorized bank. Minimum deposit ₹250/year.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
description: Loans up to ₹10 lakh for non-farm micro/small enterprises without collateral. Three categories: Shishu (₹50K), Kishore (₹5L), Tarun (₹10L).
eligibility_text: Any Indian citizen with a business plan for non-farm income-generating activity (manufacturing, trading, services).
how_to_apply: Apply at any bank, NBFC, or MFI. Can also apply online at mudra.org.in

name: Stand-Up India
description: Bank loans ₹10 lakh to ₹1 crore for SC/ST/Women entrepreneurs for setting up greenfield enterprise.
eligibility_text: SC/ST or Women entrepreneur. 18+ years. Greenfield project (first-time venture in manufacturing/services/trading).
how_to_apply: Apply at standupmitra.in or at nearest bank branch.

name: Pradhan Mantri Scholarship Scheme (PMSS)
description: Scholarship for children of ex-servicemen, CAPF, and police personnel. ₹2,500/month for boys, ₹3,000/month for girls.
eligibility_text: Children of ex-servicemen/CAPF/police. Professional degree courses. Min 60% in 12th.

name: Post Matric Scholarship (SC/ST/OBC)
description: Scholarship for SC/ST/OBC students for post-matric studies (class 11 to PhD). Covers tuition fees, maintenance allowance, and other charges.
benefit_amount: Tuition fees + ₹230-1200/month maintenance (varies by course and category)
eligibility_text: SC: family income up to ₹2.5 lakh. ST: up to ₹2.5 lakh. OBC: up to ₹1 lakh (varies by state).
how_to_apply: Apply on National Scholarship Portal: scholarships.gov.in

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension (IGNOAPS)
description: Monthly pension of ₹200 (60-79 years) or ₹500 (80+ years) for BPL elderly. State governments often add to this amount.
eligibility_text: 60+ years, BPL family. No other regular pension source.
how_to_apply: Apply at Gram Panchayat / Block office / District Social Welfare office. Also on NSP: scholarships.gov.in

name: PM Kusum (Solar Pump & Power)
description: Solar agricultural pumps with 60% subsidy. Farmers can also sell surplus solar power to the grid and earn ₹60,000-₹1,00,000 per year.
benefit_amount: 60% subsidy on solar pump + earn ₹60K-1L/year selling power
eligibility_text: Individual farmers, cooperatives, FPOs, water user associations.
how_to_apply: Apply through State Nodal Agency or online at pmkusum.mnre.gov.in

name: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
description: Cash benefit of ₹5,000 in 3 installments for pregnant and lactating women for first living child. ₹6,000 for second child (through JSY).
eligibility_text: All pregnant and lactating women (excluding those in regular employment with paid maternity benefits).
how_to_apply: Register at nearest Anganwadi centre or PHC during pregnancy.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: Guaranteed pension of ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 per month after age 60. For unorganized sector workers. Government co-contributes 50% for 5 years.
eligibility_text: Indian citizens 18-40 years, not covered by any statutory social security scheme.
how_to_apply: Open APY account at any bank or post office. Monthly contribution ₹42-1,454 based on desired pension.
